chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1016 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5987/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.3970/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.3971/2024 (S/A) 5. hearing of main case. 18-09-2025 Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>>..<<<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Mr. Manoj Kumar Tejwani, Advocate appearing for the Applicant in Crl. Misc. Appln. No.D- 503 of 2025 informed the Court that challan in the case arising out of FIR No. 380 of 2024 of Police Station, Moro has been submitted in the concerned Court of law. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner, whereas, the Petitioner has the alternate remedy available under the law to approach the trial Court for appropriate remedy. In the circumstances, this Constitutional Petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
